## Runtime.Session.EditingSession.fromPersistedState() method

Restores an editing session from a persisted state. Restores the complete editing state including undo/redo history.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static fromPersistedState(data: IPersistedFillingSession, baseRecipe: IRuntimeFillingRecipeVersion): Result<EditingSession>;
```
